title: Power Furniture
description: This is a little Simple Furniture Mod.
body:
Tired of the normal things in the game? Then you are exactly right here. With the Simple Furniture Mod you can beautify your world with new furniture.

 

- You Can craft new Lamps

- You can craft a nice Couch

-You can craft a Table with Chairs

 

and a lot more.😁

 

If you find a bug, feel free to report it in Discord.
